subparts.text: A two dimensional array M[1…50][1..20] is stored in row major order in memory. Each element in the array occupies 4 bytes. Calculate the address of the element M[15,17] if the base address is 1200
What is the time complexity of the following code: for{ for{ a=a+i+j; } }
Convert the infix expression, 4 + 3* to prefix expression using stack.

Consider the polynomial 9x6+2x4-3x2+4. Suggest a node structure for representing this polynomial as a linked list. Also show the representation of the given polynomial as a linked list using the suggested node representation.
Write an algorithm to arrange an array of integers such that even numbers are followed by odd numbers. Analyse the time complexity of the algorithm Eg:- Input : 123456 Output : 246135
write an algorithm to replace the second smallest element in a matrix with the smallest element. Analyse the time complexity of the algorithm
Write an algorithm to delete all occurrences of a given character in a string. Analyse the time complexity of the algorithm

Consider an expression containing different types of parentheses like , [ ], { } along with other characters. Write an algorithm to check whether the brackets in the expression are balanced or not using a suitable data structure. A balanced expression is one where every opening bracket has a corresponding closing bracket in the correct order.
Write an algorithm to swap the first and last nodes of a doubly linked list by modifying the links
Write an algorithm to print the nth element from the end of a linked list in a single pass. What is the time complexity of the algorithm?
